docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MILLER-FLEIG, DOUG MILLER-FLEIG, HELENA AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-25-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, PATRICIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. PLAINTIFF DOUG MILLER-FLEIG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF HELENA MILLER-FLEIG IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRICIA SULLIVAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER-FLEIG, DOUG MILLER-FLEIG, HELENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, PATRICIA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.
